name: Mexican Chicken & Barley Chili
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz Reduced sodium chicken broth (about 1-3/4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven, cook onion and garlic in oil until onion is tender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except chicken to the pan.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and cover.
5. Simmer for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add cooked chicken and continue cooking for 5 to 10 minutes or until chicken is heated through and barley is tender.
7. If the chili becomes too thick while standing, add additional water or chicken broth as needed.
